description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of mocassins from enroute. Pair them with any kind of western or ethnic wear, and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease. Upper Leather upper with a covered toe and a bow embellishment Suede inner lining with a leather footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable TPU outsole with grooves on the forefoot for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
